note: Phase 5 in progress: phase 1 CI hardening now adds superseded-run cancellation, docs-only skips, .NET package caching, and an OS matrix wired through the reusable build workflow under the repo's pinned 10.0.202 SDK. This repository already targets net10.0 in the active command packages, so the workflow intentionally tracks the pinned 10.0.202 toolchain across OS instead of the older 8/9 placeholder wording in the original plan. The track also has CodeQL plus OpenSSF Scorecard workflows, a reusable build workflow, pinned external GitHub Actions, documented repo security settings for secret scanning and dependency alerts, a coverage gate with Cobertura, CodeCoverageSummary, and Codecov OIDC, and a fork-owned release pipeline with NuGet trusted publishing, SourceLink, deterministic builds, Release Drafter notes, a production-nuget environment, dedicated smoke workflows for verification, and a release smoke checklist
description: Modernize GitHub Actions to 2026 SOTA for a .NET dotnet-tool OSS project
